creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
I apologize for the breakage. This issue should be resolved by the following MFCs to ^/stable/11 and ^/stable/10:

- https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base?view=revision&revision=312264
- https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base?view=revision&revision=312265

(they were going to be MFCed later on this week, but after I realized the breakage that I introduced by accident, I MFCed "ahead of schedule").

Please let me know how your testing goes.
